nasb.text: Now all the Moabites heard that the kings had come up to fight against them. And all who were able to put on armor and older were summoned and stood on the border.

esv.text: When all the Moabites heard that the kings had come up to fight against them, all who were able to put on armor, from the youngest to the oldest, were called out and were drawn up at the border.

cnv.text: 摩押全國聽見這幾位君王上來要攻打他們，就召集所有能夠穿上武裝的，不論老幼，到邊界上防守。

ccb.text: 摩押人听说三王联军进攻他们，于是把凡能打仗的，不论老少都聚集起来，把守在边界上。
